project-001/administrator/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in newer Spring Boot versions.
project-001/administrator/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is removed or deprecated in favor of Jakarta EE namespaces in Spring Boot 3.x/JDK 21 environments, causing compile errors for annotations like @PostConstruct.

project-001/administrator/pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve compatibility issues between Lombok and MapStruct during annotation processing.
project-001/administrator/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, MapStruct may fail to process Lombok-generated getters/setters correctly, leading to compile-time errors in generated mapper implementations.

project-001/administrator/pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding to the annotation processor paths in the maven-compiler-plugin configuration.
project-001/administrator/pom.xml.why_exists: The binding must be on the annotation processor path to function; otherwise, MapStruct will not recognize Lombok annotations, causing compile failures.

project-001/administrator/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace explicit source and target compiler settings with the release flag for cross-compilation support.
project-001/administrator/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' in modern JDKs; using them with JDK 21 may cause warnings or incompatibilities if not aligned with the module system.

project-001/administrator/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with JDK 21.
project-001/administrator/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not fully support JDK 21 features or the 'release' flag correctly.
